=============================

   Shortest path problem

Module Contents
---------------

.. py:class:: shortestPathModel(grid: tuple[int, int])

   Bases: :py:obj:`pyepo.model.copt.coptmodel.optCoptModel`


   This class is an optimization model for the shortest path problem

   :ivar _model: COPT model
   :vartype _model: COPT model
   :ivar grid: size of grid network
   :vartype grid: tuple of int
   :ivar arcs: list of arcs

   :vartype arcs: list


   .. py:attribute:: grid


   .. py:attribute:: arcs
      :value: []
